prospects.name: Julian Flanagan
prospects.profile: Age 21, incoming Berkeley Biophysics PhD student, currently out of state
prospects.matchAssessment: EXCELLENT - 5+ year funded program, quiet/tidy, wants year lease with renewal, Aug 1 move-in aligns perfectly, values BART access + parking + peaceful environment. Best prospect to date.
prospects.lastMessage: Sounds great! Evenings also work for me - this week, I'm available any evening other than Thursday. (April 5, 10:47 AM EDT)
